title: SoniChronos
description: Adds Blocks & Features from Sonic CD!
body:
**The Mod is VERY WIP so expect changes in the Future, get it?**


SoniChronos adds Blocks & Features from Sonic CD Including Time Travel! This Mod is featured in Steeles's Sonic Islands Server! 


Original Curseforge Page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sonichronos








<iframe width="300" height="100" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qmaE-u3U6-g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
**Dependencies:** Geckolib

**Features Included as of now**

 •  Time Travel: Use time posts (the Past and Future signposts from Sonic CD) to switch between past, present, bad future, and good future versions of the Little Planet

•  Little Planet Dimensions: These start as void worlds based on Sonic CD's Little Planet with custom Skyboxes. In Creative mode, players can build their own custom Little Planet and time zones

• Palmtree Panic Blocks: More blocks will be added soon, this first version is just a test!

 

**Info:** To get to Little Planet either use a Time Post in the Overworld, or go to the SoniChronos Utility Creative Tab and place the invinsible Teleporter

 

Requirements: Geckolib

Credits: Texture's, Models & Logo by Lighter .F
